case_title: CARLEVARIS, PHIL vs. SALCEDO, VERONICA et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARLEVARIS, PHIL AS TO DEFENDANT SALCEDO, VERONICA DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT SALCEDO, VERONICA
PHOTOCOPY FOR 2 COPY FOR CASE NUMBER 112159. DEFT COPY. FOR DEFENDANT SALCEDO, VERONICA
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARLEVARIS, PHIL SERVED NOV-19-1994, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SALCEDO, VERONICA
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARLEVARIS, PHIL COURT TRIAL SET FOR DEC-21-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

JUDGE WICK, DCOSTELO, REPORTER, GGOROSIN, CLERK. 9:25 AM C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT, DEFT IN PRO PER. CASE SETTLED, TERMS ON THE RECORD AS FOLLOWS: JUDGMENT FOR THE PLTF, & AGAINST DEFT FOR RESTITUTION OF THE SUBJECT PREMISES, WRIT MAY ISSUE, BUT PHYSICAL EVICTION STAYED UNTIL 1/15/95. PARTIES AGREED THAT DEFT IS THE SOLE OCCUPANT, PLTF. WAIVED RENTS/DAMAGES, DEFT WAIVES RIGHTS TO THE SECURITY DEPOSIT & INTEREST COMPUTATION. PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT BY DEFT IS ABANDONED TO PLTF. TO DISPOSE. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS/FEES. PLTF. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT
DECLARATION OF MARC SEIDENFELD RE: DEFAULT BY DEFT. AND REQUEST FOR JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARLEVARIS, PHIL

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SALCEDO, VERONICA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 26 - A CAMELLIA AVE., STAYED UNTIL JAN-15-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, DEFT. WAIVES SECURITY DEPOSIT, LAST MONTH'S RENT AND INTEREST THEREON; WRIT MAY ISSUE BUT NO EVICTION UNTIL AFTER 6PM ON 15-JAN-95; PLTF. WAIVES BACK RENT AND DAMAGES.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SALCEDO, VERONICA
